title: Big Globe - Just Enough Guns Compatibility
description: this mod adds compatibility between Big Globe generation and Just Enough Guns
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server)
Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great)

Makes the scrap and brimstone ores from Just Enough Guns generate in Big Globe worlds
